---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
date: 2026-03-11
---
```{python}
import seaborn as sns
sns.set_theme(style="darkgrid")
```
```{python}
tips = sns.load_dataset("tips")
tips.head()
```
```{python}
g = sns.jointplot(
    x="total_bill", y="tip", data=tips,
                  kind="reg", truncate=False,
                  xlim=(0, 60), ylim=(0, 12),
                  color="m", height=7)
```
